nasb.text: who had come to hear Him and to be healed of their diseases; and those who were troubled with unclean spirits were being cured.

esv.text: who came to hear him and to be healed of their diseases. And those who were troubled with unclean spirits were cured.

cnv.text: 他們要聽他講道，也要他們的疾病得醫好。還有一些被污靈纏擾的也痊愈了。

ccb.text: 那些被污鬼缠身的人也得到了祂的医治。

csbs.text: 他们来是要听他讲说，要他们的病得痊愈。那些被污灵折磨的，都得了痊愈。
